Extreme Testing of ARBO @Miss Teng

Author

Deng Xinyin

Published

April 17, 2026

In preliminary tests, ARBO was able to process a constructed MSI-like dataset with approximately 1,000 features and 1.57 million pixels, suggesting potential scalability to large datasets.

Spatial clustering

library(ARBO)
library(Cardinal)
demo_msi <- readImzML("/home/hsinyinteng/Miss_Teng.imzML/Miss_Teng.imzML")
demo_msi
MSImagingExperiment with 1000 features and 1572864 spectra 
spectraData(1): intensity
featureData(1): mz
pixelData(5): x, y, run, ROI, pixel_ID
coord(2): x = 1...1024, y = 1...1536
runNames(1): Miss_Teng
experimentData(3): spectrumType, spectrumRepresentation, instrumentModel
mass range:   50 to 1500 
centroided: FALSE 
# 1. Extract matrix
dat <- extract_spectra_matrix(demo_msi)
# 2. Data check
check_spectra_matrix(dat$spectra)
# 3. Remove constant features
spectra_filtered <- remove_constant_features(dat$spectra)
# 4. Min-max normalization
spectra_scaled <- apply_feature_scaling(spectra_filtered, method = "minmax")
print(range(spectra_scaled, na.rm = TRUE))
[1] 0 1
# 5. Check Python environment
check_umap_python_env("/home/hsinyinteng/miniconda3/envs/dxy_python9/bin/python")

# 6. UMAP # Recommended 'cosine', 'correlation', 'euclidean' 'chebyshev', 'manhattan',
# 'minkowski' # Not Recommended 'canberra', 'braycurtis', 'hamming', 'jaccard'

umap_df <- run_umap_py(x = spectra_scaled, python_path = "/home/hsinyinteng/miniconda3/envs/dxy_python9/bin/python",
    metric = "cosine", n_neighbors = 15L, min_dist = 0.1, n_components = 2L, random_state = NULL,
    n_jobs = 4L, verbose = TRUE)
UMAP(angular_rp_forest=True, metric='cosine', n_jobs=4, verbose=True)
Fri Apr 17 09:42:27 2026 Construct fuzzy simplicial set
Fri Apr 17 09:42:37 2026 Finding Nearest Neighbors
Fri Apr 17 09:42:39 2026 Building RP forest with 64 trees
Fri Apr 17 09:57:56 2026 NN descent for 21 iterations
     1  /  21
     2  /  21
     3  /  21
     4  /  21
     5  /  21
     6  /  21
     7  /  21
     8  /  21
     9  /  21
     10  /  21
     11  /  21
    Stopping threshold met -- exiting after 11 iterations
Fri Apr 17 10:09:22 2026 Finished Nearest Neighbor Search
Fri Apr 17 10:12:00 2026 Construct embedding
    completed  0  /  200 epochs
    completed  20  /  200 epochs
    completed  40  /  200 epochs
    completed  60  /  200 epochs
    completed  80  /  200 epochs
    completed  100  /  200 epochs
    completed  120  /  200 epochs
    completed  140  /  200 epochs
    completed  160  /  200 epochs
    completed  180  /  200 epochs
Fri Apr 17 11:03:43 2026 Finished embedding
# 7. Clustering
Cluster_res <- run_clustering(embedding = umap_df, method = "gmm", centers = 10L)

# 8. Merge results
cluster_df <- build_cluster_dataframe(embedding = umap_df, cluster = Cluster_res$cluster, pixel_info = dat$pixel_info)
cluster_df$cluster <- cluster_df$cluster

# 9. Result visualization
library(ggplot2)
p <- ggplot(cluster_df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = factor(cluster))) + geom_point(size = 0.01, alpha = 0.999) +
    scale_y_reverse() + scale_color_manual(values = c(`1` = "#3C5488", `2` = "#00A087", `3` = "#E64B35",
    `4` = "#F39B7F", `5` = "#4DBBD5", `6` = "#8491B4", `7` = "#91D1C2", `8` = "#7E6148", `9` = "#DC0000",
    `10` = "#B09C85", `11` = "gold", `12` = "red", `13` = "grey", `14` = "black"), name = "Cluster",
    guide = guide_legend(title.position = "left", title.hjust = 0.5, ncol = 4, byrow = TRUE, override.aes = list(size = 8))) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1) + theme_minimal(base_size = 14, base_family = "Arial") + theme(axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal", legend.justification = "center", legend.spacing.x = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16), legend.title = element_text(size = 18), plot.margin = margin(10,
        10, 20, 10))
p
library(extrafont)
ggsave("/home/hsinyinteng/Teng_GMM.pdf", plot = p, width = 6, height = 8, device = cairo_pdf)
